title: 10 health benefits of Boswellia sacra (frankincense)
intro: Boswellia sacra has health benefits such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Its medicinal properties include inhibiting enzymes involved in inflammation and oxidative stress, which can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis, asthma, and other inflammatory conditions. By reducing inflammation and promoting relaxation, frankincense may improve sleep quality, reduce anxiety and depression, and even support cancer treatment.
